commands.details: Exited 0; 40 test files passed, 277 tests passed.
Exited 0 with no ESLint warnings or errors; Next.js emitted deprecation/workspace-root warnings only.

steps.expected: Test runner exits 0 with all tests passing

steps.observed: Exited 0; no ESLint warnings or errors.

commands: pnpm exec vitest run -> 0 (40 files, 277 tests passed)

assertions.title: Admin panel accessible and visually coherent

steps.observed: Admin login rendered with email/password form.

steps.expected: Admin UI uses updated visual system and admin data loads
steps.observed: Dashboard showed shared Inter typography, rounded cards, shadows, and `GET /api/admin/stats` requests while rendering totals and management links.

evidence.consoleErrors: `agent-browser errors` returned `Invalid or unexpected token`, so no clean console-errors readback was available; no visible runtime breakage occurred during the tested flow.
evidence.network: POST /api/auth/callback/credentials -> redirect to /admin/dashboard; GET /api/admin/stats observed twice and dashboard data rendered; after logout, direct GET /admin/dashboard redirected to /admin/login.

steps.action: Capture user-facing home page and admin dashboard screenshots
steps.expected: Shared visual language can be compared

steps.action: Inspect computed body styles on user home and admin dashboard
steps.observed: Both pages reported `font: 16px 400 Inter`, black text, and transparent page background.

steps.action: Visually compare cards, spacing, and controls
steps.observed: Admin dashboard uses the same Inter font family, rounded cards, elevated surfaces, and blue-accent controls consistent with the user home page rather than a separate visual language.

styleChecks: User home body: font 16px 400 Inter; color rgb(0, 0, 0)
Admin dashboard body: font 16px 400 Inter; color rgb(0, 0, 0)

frictions.description: The mission-specific `/Users/wendy/.factory/library/user-testing.md` guidance file was absent, so only mission AGENTS guidance and the validation contract could be followed.
frictions.resolution: Proceeded with the provided mission instructions and assigned assertion definitions.

frictions.description: `agent-browser errors` returned `Invalid or unexpected token` on this local app session instead of a normal console error listing.
frictions.resolution: Recorded the tool issue in evidence and relied on visible UI behavior plus network/output checks for the affected UI assertions.

frictions.description: `pnpm test` launches Vitest watch mode and did not exit on its own even after all tests passed.
frictions.resolution: Reran tests with `pnpm exec vitest run` to obtain a one-shot exit code for reportable evidence.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. Admin login, auth gating, and visual coherence were confirmed in the browser, and page-polish validators (`pnpm exec vitest run`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`) all exited successfully.
